title: Records clerks and assistants
description: Recruit, screen, interview, or place individuals within an organization. May perform other activities in multiple human resources areas. Recruit and hire seasonal or temporary agricultural laborers. May transport, house, and provide meals for workers. Coordinate activities of staff, convention personnel, or clients to make arrangements for group meetings, events, or conventions. (Based on 77 related US occupations.)
